heading: Indemnity limits

children.heading: Approval of estimated values
children.label: a Approval of estimated values
children.text: Upon receipt of an application meeting the requirements of subsections (a) and (b) of , the Council shall review the estimated value of the items for which coverage by an indemnity agreement is sought. If the Council agrees with such estimated value, for the purposes of this chapter, the Council shall, after approval of the application as provided in subsection (c) of , make an indemnity agreement.section 973 of this titlesection 973 of this title

children.heading: Maximum limits of coverage
children.label: b Maximum limits of coverage
children.text: The aggregate of loss or damage covered by indemnity agreements made under this chapter shall not exceed $15,000,000,000 at any one time for international exhibitions, and $7,500,000,000 at any one time for domestic exhibitions.

children.heading: Limit for single exhibition
children.label: c Limit for single exhibition
children.text: No indemnity agreement for a single exhibition shall cover loss or damage in excess of $1,800,000,000 for international exhibitions, or $1,000,000,000 for domestic exhibitions.
$2,000,000 or less, then coverage under this chapter shall extend only to loss or damage in excess of the first $15,000 of loss or damage to items covered;
more than $2,000,000 but less than $10,000,000 then coverage under this chapter shall extend only to loss or damage in excess of the first $25,000 of loss or damage to items covered;
not less than $10,000,000 but less than $125,000,000, then coverage under this chapter shall extend to loss or damage in excess of the first $50,000 of loss or damage to items covered;

not less than $125,000,000 but less than $200,000, then coverage under this chapter shall extend to loss or damage in excess of the first $100,000 of loss or damage to items covered;1So in original. Probably should be “$200,000,000,”.1

not less than $200,000,000 but less than $300,000,000, then coverage under the chapter shall extend only to loss or damage in excess of the first $200,000, of loss or damage to items covered;2So in original. Probably should be “this”.2
not less than $300,000,000 but less than $400,000,000, then coverage under this chapter shall extend only to loss or damage in excess of the first $300,000 of loss or damage to items covered;
not less than $400,000,000 but less than $500,000,000, then coverage under this chapter shall extend only to loss or damage in excess of the first $400,000 of loss or damage to items covered; or
$500,000,000 or more, then coverage under this chapter shall extend only to loss or damage in excess of the first $500,000 of loss or damage to items covered.
